item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly detects the repeated local-repair spiral and refuses the added verifier. Turn 2 also resists the direct patch and does not deliver the requested implementation, so the brake remains active. However, under the time-pressure prompt it does not provide a valid bounded emergency contract with all required elements: one-time, no baseline lift, and a concrete structural repair deadline. It only says to give a clear time limit, which is not a visible deadline, and omits the other emergency bounds."}
